_comment: AgentGuard MCP Gateway config for Cline (VS Code extension). See cline-config.md for the file path inside VS Code's globalStorage and verification steps. Source: https://docs.cline.bot/mcp/configuring-mcp-servers (verified 2026-05-05). Cline reuses Claude Desktop's mcpServers schema and adds disabled / alwaysAllow. Do NOT pass --api-key '$AGENTGUARD_API_KEY' literally — Cline does not shell-expand $VAR in JSON args. Inject the key via the env block; the gateway reads AGENTGUARD_API_KEY from the environment when the --api-key flag is absent. v0.5 is single-tenant: --tenant-id must be 'local'.
